rationale: Empirical checks and pinned source inspection support the refactor. The targeted verdict tests pass, including the two unchanged Allow wording rows and the 14-row delegation table. Full internal/instruct testing fails only TestRun_IdleNoBeads on the known multiple-active-specs idle path, with no diff in run.go/run_test.go. verdict() builds panel.GateFacts, delegates to panel.PanelGateDecision, relays Warn/Block messages verbatim, and synthesizes only the legacy Allow reason. Scan/Tally guarantees make Result{Panel:nil, PanelErr:nil} unreachable through gatherPanelState for registered panels; direct fabricated input now blocks, which is fail-closed and advisory-only. The GateIO adapter is type-correct: errBranchGone cleanly maps to MissingRef, empty Worktree skips dirty checks, and non-bead panels leave HeadSHA empty. Scope is limited to internal/instruct plus workflow documentation; internal/panel is untouched.

findings.title: Required commands
findings.details: go build ./... exited 0 and printed: "go: writing stat cache: open /Users/Max/go/pkg/mod/cache/download/github.com/mrmaxsteel/mindspec/@v/v0.10.1-0.20260708231048-6ca7bb08dcd8.info318052283.tmp: operation not permitted". Targeted go test passed: TestPanelStateEntry_Verdict rows at_threshold_fresh/above_threshold_fresh and all other rows PASS; TestPanelStateVerdict_DelegatesToPanelGateDecision all 14 rows PASS.

findings.title: Known package failure
findings.details: go test ./internal/instruct/... -v failed only TestRun_IdleNoBeads. The failure output shows the test expected "No Active Work" but got "MindSpec — Multiple Active Specs" listing specs 110, 111, and 112. This exercises Run/idle cwd state resolution, not panelstate verdict logic; run.go and run_test.go have no diff in the reviewed commit.

findings.title: Delegation and seam
findings.details: internal/instruct/panelstate.go calls panel.PanelGateDecision(facts), maps Allow/Warn/Block to GatePass/GateWarn/GateBlock, and contains none of the four deleted pre-refactor message literals checked by the test. The BranchSHAResolver-to-GateIO adapter preserves missing-ref, dirty-tree-inert, and non-bead-staleness-inert behavior.

findings.title: Scope
findings.details: git diff --name-only for 25ad5ca9^..25ad5ca9 lists only .mindspec/domains/workflow/overview.md, internal/instruct/panelstate.go, and internal/instruct/panelstate_test.go; internal/panel has no diff.
